channel.title: New on US Digital Rental
channel.description: Movies newly available to rent on Amazon Video (PVOD window).

item.title: [Amazon Video] London's Last Wilderness (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h · Science Fiction, Documentary · dir. Pablo Behrens · with Marcus Darivas, Anastasia Pillar

When an alien visitor discovers it can communicate with Earth’s oceans, it becomes the only intermediary between humanity and a vast marine intelligence whose patience with the human race is running out. Part survey, part discovery, the film explores a stretch of the wilderness that has largely slipped through the cracks of human attention, and in some places, bears the marks of human failure. The alien encounters a force both beautiful and terrifying, a voice as old as the planet itself, carrying memories, warnings and a power beyond human control. The film is a parable about nature on Earth by establishing an unidentified alien as interacting with the planet. By way of subtle messages the sea warns the alien that the existence of the planet is at stake. The alien discovers a controlling city but does not interfere with it and hopes that the sea will find a way to survive.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Mr. X (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · India · 2h 33m · Action, Thriller · dir. Manu Anand · with Arya, Gautham Ram Karthik

Centers on secret intelligence agency cases involving five major national threats that were thwarted through covert operations.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Lechindi Mahila Lokam (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 50m · Comedy, Drama · dir. Carthyk-Arjun · with Gemini Ashok, Sreerama chandra

IMDb 7.3

Centers women's voices in a narrative of empowerment and resistance. The Telugu film weaves together diverse female experiences, examining how women balance societal expectations, personal goals, and systemic obstacles.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Effortless: The Eddie Fiola Story (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · Documentary · dir. Billy Henrickle · with Eddie Fiola, Tony Hawk

Follows BMX legend and Hollywood stuntman Eddie Fiola's career, personal life, and pursuit of making it to the top in his sport and second career as an elite stuntman on some of the biggest budget movies in Hollywood.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Scared to Death (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 38m · NR · Horror, Comedy · dir. Paul Boyd · with Lin Shaye, Bill Moseley

Jasper, a young filmmaker, seizes a chance to direct when his crew attends a séance in a haunted children's shelter. Trapped inside, they're haunted by ghostly orphans and a sinister force.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Król dopalaczy (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · Poland · 1h 57m · Thriller, Crime · dir. Pat Howl · with Tomasz Włosok, Vanessa Aleksander

TMDB 7.0 (3)

Dawid is an ordinary boy who builds a legal drug empire and becomes an overnight millionaire. Sudden fame, beautiful women, fast cars, endless partying, confrontations with gangsters, and dealings at the highest levels of power—this is his new world, where the line between legal and illegal is as thin as the line in a mirror. When an ethical cop arrives, everything is at stake. Will Dawid be able to stop him before it's too late? Will love save him from ultimate collapse?

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] El hombre de la luz (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Venezuela · 1h 30m · Science Fiction, Drama · dir. Christian Márquez · with Leónidas Urbina, Juvel Vielma

The Mesa de Adrián region, located between the towns of La Paya and Bailadores in the state of Mérida, bears witness to the birth of Luis Zambrano, on May 1, 1901. His inventiveness and passion led him to become a popular, innovative, and self-taught technologist, bringing electricity to remote communities in the Andean region for the first time. Awarded an honorary doctorate by the University of Los Andes (ULA), his name can be found on the doors of the School of Mechanics at this institution. Until his death in 1990, he continued to work tirelessly on machines and artifacts that resembled beings from other eras.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Amazon Video] Patton Oswalt: Tea & Scotch (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 53m · Comedy · dir. Patton Oswalt

Follows comedian Patton Oswalt with new takes on parenting, living with a cat who sees ghosts, yard cleaning videos, artificial intelligence, and more.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Ancient Underwater Marvels: Evidence of Atlantis (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 1m · G · Documentary, Science Fiction · dir. Rodrigo John

By examining cutting edge sonar technology, expert analysis and a relentless pursuit of truth, scientists strip away the layers of speculation surrounding Atlantis

item.title: [Amazon Video] Animal Farm (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 36m · PG · Animation, Comedy, Drama, Family, Science Fiction · dir. Andy Serkis

TMDB 4.9 (8) · RT 27% · Metacritic 33

A group of farm animals rise up against their neglectful owner, dreaming of equality and freedom. But as the pigs take control, the revolution turns into tyranny, with truth rewritten and dissent crushed.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Over Your Dead Body (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America / Norway / Finland · 1h 45m · R · Comedy, Action, Thriller · dir. Jorma Taccone

TMDB 6.4 (5) · IMDb 7.1 · Metacritic 52

A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Desert Warrior (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America / Saudi Arabia · 2h 6m · R · Action, Drama, History · dir. Rupert Wyatt

TMDB 6.0 (2)

Defying a ruthless emperor, a princess flees into the Arabian desert, hunted by mercenaries. Forged into a warrior and aided by a legendary bandit, she unites warring tribes for a last stand that will change history.

item.title: [Amazon Video] A Royal Romance in Ibiza (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 30m · Romance · dir. Graham Pritz-Bennett

After a painful breakup with her ex-business partner, Dylan Harper, a talented American developer, is determined to prove herself on her next big contract - creating a luxury wellness hotel for His Royal Highness King Edward on the breathtaking island of Ibiza. The opportunity is a dream come true for Dylan - until she comes face to face with the king's son, Prince Nicholas, a dashing bachelor with his own ideas on how to execute the hotel project.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Mermaid (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 45m · Drama, Comedy, Horror · dir. Tyler Cornack

IMDb 6.2 · RT 92%

A Percocet-addicted ‘Florida Man’ finds a wounded mermaid at his lowest point. Fascination becomes a drug infused, one sided relationship — sending him further into decline. When word spreads about his secret, he’ll stop at nothing to protect her.

item.title: [Amazon Video] The Fort (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 18m

In a world destroyed by war, pandemics, and disaster, a small group of survivors finds refuge inside a rebuilt stronghold known as The Fort. As darkness rises and deception spreads, the community must stand together in faith and courage to defend their last haven and fight for truth, hope, and the future of mankind.

item.title: [Amazon Video] The Kinderhook Creature: In the Shadow of Sasquatch (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · PG-13 · Documentary, History · dir. Seth Breedlove

Kinderhook is a quiet, picturesque community found in Columbia County, New York, typified by bubbling streams, thick forests and generational homes. But Kinderhook is much more than a small, rural town. In the 1980s an author and radio broadcaster named Bruce Hallenbeck and his family were beset by continual encounters with a strange, upright creature. The sightings became an international phenomenon, and even stranger, were but one of many odd events chronicled by Hallenbeck and others.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Cain (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · 52m · Horror, Drama, Fantasy, Science Fiction · dir. Timothy Jack, Cordero Sinclair

A family barricades themselves in their Tokyo home during a global crisis, but buried secrets soon resurface, threatening to tear them apart.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Death Does Not Exist (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Canada / France / Luxembourg · 1h 12m · Animation, Drama · dir. Félix Dufour-Laperrière

TMDB 7.3 (3)

After a failed armed attack during which she abandons her companions, Hélène flees into the forest and meets Catherine, a mysterious alter ego, a carnivorous and tempting alter ego. This double will take her to a fantastic valley, where metamorphoses, poisonous powers and great upheavals will soon shake up the order of things. Hélène will have to revisit her choices and the moral, political and human dilemmas that circumscribe them.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Kontinental '25 (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Romania / Brazil / Switzerland / United Kingdom / Luxembourg · 1h 49m · NR · Comedy, Drama · dir. Radu Jude

TMDB 6.4 (29) · IMDb 6.9 · Metacritic 82

Orsolya is a bailiff in Cluj, the main city in Transylvania. One day she has to evict a homeless man from a cellar, an action with tragic consequences that triggers a moral crisis which Orsolya must weather as best she can.

item.title: [Amazon Video] No One Cares About Crazy People (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 36m · NR · Documentary · dir. Gail Freedman

With a fusion of intimate storytelling and broad reportage, No One Cares About Crazy People is an immersive deep dive into the crisis and chaos of severe mental illness (SMI). The documentary humanizes the face of SMI with a small cast of memorable characters, followed in real time over several years, as they — and also their families — navigate a system that too often seems to conspire against them. The historic roots of this national crisis are traced, as well as the emergence of bold but controversial activism that seeks to reinvent those failed policies. Inspired by the book of the same name by Pulitzer Prize-winning journalist and New York Times bestselling author Ron Powers. With narration by actor Bob Odenkirk and original music by Wilco frontman Jeff Tweedy.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Kangaroo Island (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Australia · 1h 50m · Drama, Comedy · dir. Timothy David

TMDB 6.7 (3) · IMDb 6.9

Lou Wells has hit rock bottom after a promising start to her Hollywood career. Now broke and aimless, she reluctantly accepts a plane ticket from her estranged father, Rory to return home to South Australia’s ruggedly beautiful Kangaroo Island. As years of unresolved tension start to resurface, the reunion turns even more complicated when Lou and her sister Freya learn about Rory’s secret.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Two Women (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Canada · 1h 40m · Comedy · dir. Chloé Robichaud

TMDB 6.5 (13) · IMDb 6.5 · Metacritic 60

Violette and Florence are two women with something in common, beyond being neighbours. While one finds herself on an emotional edge during her maternity leave, the other feels nothing at all, and neither can make sense of what’s happening to them. Realising that their suburban lives have left them unfulfilled, Florence begins an affair that kicks off a sexual revolution where having fun is the top priority. But between handyman hookups, chaotic misadventures, and marital strife, is reality destined to come crashing down on them?

item.title: [Amazon Video] When I Said I Do (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 30m · Drama, Romance, TV Movie · dir. Stefan Brogren

TMDB 3.0 (1)

Ali Corley is a widowed search-and-rescue K-9 handler who rebuilt her life after losing her husband in the line of duty. When she meets seasoned rescue specialist Shawn Willis, their connection forces them both to confront the true meaning of commitment.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Joe Baby (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 26m · Action, Thriller, Crime, Mystery · dir. Steven Brand

TMDB 5.5 (1) · IMDb 4.2

Joe Baby is a private investigator searching for money that has been stolen from Heather Stanton, only to find all roads lead to the mysterious death of her father, Walter Baby.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Everyone Has Something to Hide (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · Canada · 1h 30m · Thriller · dir. Sean Cisterna

TMDB 9.0 (1)

Kathy is shocked when she finds out her son Noah's former best friend Ethan has been murdered. She's even more shocked when her straight-A son is the prime suspect. Kathy fights to clear her son's name.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Throuple (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 32m · NR · Comedy, Drama, Romance · dir. Greyson Horst

TMDB 6.3 (3)

Michael, a lonely gay singer-songwriter terrified of pursuing his musical dreams and exploring romantic intimacy, relies on his best friend and her girlfriend for support and affection. However, when he meets a newly open married couple seeking a casual encounter, the three men enter into a relationship that is more vulnerable than any of them ever expected.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Voidance (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 27m · Science Fiction, Thriller · dir. Marianna Dean

To join the elite ATIC Guard, Alana Toro must pass one final test: enter a simulation, prevent a terrorist attack, and prove her loyalty. Every mistake resets the clock. Every death disappears - except in her memory, where the weight keeps building. The more Alana learns, the more she begins to question the organisation she fought so hard to join.

item.title: [Amazon Video] San Francisco Rising (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United States of America · 1h 31m · Documentary · dir. Adam Leao

A city of reinvention, San Francisco tries to rise from the ashes after an era of turmoil and troubled headlines. Told through intimate vignettes; a Muni operator, the mayor, artists, the man who cremates overdose victims and dozens more.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Hotel Excelsior (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · Switzerland · 1h 15m · Comedy, Drama · dir. Talkhon Hamzavi, Jessy Moravec, Liliane Ott, Martin Skalský

A mysterious concierge guides us through stories that unfold in the same room over a century. A Jewish businessman celebrates a lonely family festivity with his daughter. A planned suicide leads to a life-changing encounter. An ageing rock band struggles with their image, and a young woman sees a callboy as her big chance for financial independence.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Departures (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 22m · Drama, Comedy · dir. Lloyd Eyre-Morgan, Neil Ely

TMDB 6.2 (2) · RT 95%

It’s instant chemistry when Benji encounters Jake at an airport departures gate. Their on-going relationship unfolds through intimate trips to Amsterdam, revealing a complex power dynamic.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Is Your Smartphone Spying On You? (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 44m · Documentary · dir. Claire Burnett

Alexis Conran explores the claims that smartphones and tech companies might be listening in on users and collecting a vast amount of personal data. How do our phones seem to know everything?

item.title: [Amazon Video] All the World Is Green (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 8m

In a world heading towards climate breakdown, All the World is Green takes us on a journey to discover how much what we put on our table fuels climate change. Through the guidance of scientists, academics, activists, journalists and philosophers, we embark on a journey spanning from China to the USA, leading us to discover how our love for animal products took over our food system, pushing our ecosystems to the verge of collapse for the profit of a handful of corporations. After a journey stretching through Asia, America and Europe, the film leaves the viewer with a choice: remaining part of the problem, or becoming part of the solution.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Tracking the Wendigo (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2026 · 1h 43m · Documentary · dir. Jason Hewlett

TMDB 8.0 (1)

A history of encounters in Edmonton and British Columbia.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Devoted Heart (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 37m · NR · Drama, Family, Romance · dir. Billy Dickson

"Devoted Heart" reimagines the Nativity in modern times. War veteran Joe Shepherd returns home to find fiancée Mary mysteriously pregnant. An angelic dream reveals the divine truth: she carries Jesus, humanity's savior. Braving gossip and doubt, they embark on a census-mandated road trip, stranding in a storm where Mary births Jesus in a shed. Angelic visions summon migrant workers to adore the child.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Pizza Under Fire (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · 1h 12m · Documentary · dir. Adrian Pennink

A brave group of international volunteers take their converted truck into Ukraine’s Eastern frontline villages to cook, hand out free pizzas and paint the faces of the children. Their presence offers a brief moment of joy and escapism in ‘forgotten’ villages, many of which had been occupied by Russia and which now face reoccupation; villages that have been largely abandoned by their government and by other aid agencies.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Lenskeeper - Alle porte dell’abisso (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video

2025 · Horror · dir. Luca Canale Brucculeri

item.title: [Amazon Video] Finding Me (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2026-05-21

Inspired by Everything Everywhere All at Once. A 20-year-old homo sapiens took a walk on his feet from the house to all around the city. Once he passed the furthest point of his path, he was picked up by his older cousin (much appreciated) for an unexpected hangout, complete with good food and deep talks. The day wrapped up with a little bit of rain.

item.title: [Amazon Video] L'Envol (2026)
item.description: New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2026-04-21

item.title: [Amazon Video] Ella solo come carne (2026)
item.description: New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2026-04-17

item.title: [Amazon Video] Reckless (2026)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2026-02-07

A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist.

item.title: [Amazon Video] A Movie Trip (2025)
item.description: New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2025-11-06

item.title: [Amazon Video] Roses on the Vine (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2025-11-03

During a scorching Los Angeles summer, a single dad food delivery gig worker with a checkered past and his mischievous seven year old daughter crisscross the city on his scooter each day as they do whatever it takes to scrape by.

item.title: [Amazon Video] Fleak (2025)
item.description:
New to rent on Amazon Video — released 2025-08-06

When 12-year-old Lauri tries too hard to get his older siblings’ attention he falls badly and loses his ability to walk. Now Lauri is stuck at home, lonelier than he ever was. Just then a helpful furry creature from another dimension appears and takes him on a fantasy adventure. In the other dimension Lauri trades his shadow for being able to walk again, but the shadow becomes a goofy, all-eating monster who follows Lauri back to his world. To beat the monster Lauri needs to team up with his siblings and give up his ability to walk. However, Lauri is now determined to learn to walk again and he has his siblings beside him - and that’s what really matters.
